TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang marosan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 159 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 64%, Setik 3%, Bunun 3%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na marosan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na marosan hya' ga snuwing. tay mkyahu' na marosan hya' ga sasi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maros~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕas~ɕi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang marosan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 65 buwan, 159 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 71% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 29% kyan ku 46 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 64%, Setik 3%, Bunun 3%, Amis 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na marosan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na marosan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na marosan hya' ga snuwing. tay mkyahu' na marosan hya' ga sasi. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ maros~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na maros~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕas~ɕi. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
